codeReview.summary: Pass. The prior blocking issue from `fix-exit-resilience` is now covered: `src/App.tsx` splits `ipc.unregisterHotkeys()` from the rest of the stop flow, then still calls `ipc.exitTeleprompter()` and unconditionally resets local teleprompter state to editor mode. The new regression test exercises the reject path and verifies the exit IPC plus state reset still happen.

summary: Pass. I reviewed prior failure `fix-exit-resilience` (commit `95ef80b`) and the rerun fix `fix-app-stop-exit-resilience` (commit `3b6f4e2`). The previously-missed App-level `hotkey://stop` path now mirrors the TeleprompterView resilience fix, and `src/App.test.tsx` adds a focused regression test proving exit still completes when `unregisterHotkeys()` rejects.
